M1200G_APLCTN_DRSNG_CD M1200G_APLCTN_DRSNG_CD M1200G Skin and Ulcer Treatments: Application Nonsurgical Dressing Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that nonsurgical dressings (with or without topical medications) are applied to body other than feet. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
